privileged_info_summary: The task involves planning a Fleet Review at Spithead (a real anchorage near Portsmouth in the Solent), a genuine historical naval ceremony concept. The fleet of 5 vessels is positioned at Latitude 50.741667°N, Longitude -1.133333°W (corresponding to 50° 44.50' N, 001° 08.00' W as stated in the task). Ships are spaced 0.4 nautical miles apart along a line bearing 115° True, with a reviewing vessel positioned 0.2 nautical miles to the south traveling at 10 knots. All metadata parameter values are mathematically verified conversions from the task description. The scenario data to be created is synthetic (agent-generated within Bridge Command, a real open-source maritime simulator).
